prompt: You buy a loaf of bread for $4 and a quart of milk for $3. How much do you spend in all?
You give the cashier a $20 bill for groceries that cost $14. How much change do you get back?
A recipe makes 12 cookies. You give 5 to a neighbor. How many are left?
Yesterday's high was 67°F. Today's high is 72°F. How much warmer is today?
You walk 4 blocks to the store and then 4 blocks home. How many blocks did you walk in all?
A dozen eggs cost $5. A pound of butter costs $6. How much for both?
You water 8 tomato plants in the morning and 4 more in the evening. How many in all?
A pot of soup serves 6 people. 4 sit down to eat. How many servings are left?
You read 15 pages before lunch and 10 pages after. How many pages did you read today?
There are 24 apples in a basket. You use 6 to make a pie. How many apples are left?
A bus comes every 10 minutes. If you just missed one, how long until the next two?
You buy 3 stamps at 60 cents each. How much do the stamps cost in all?
A roast takes 45 minutes to cook. You put it in at 5:00. What time will it be done?
Your wallet has $30. You spend $12 at the diner. How much is left?
A garden has 5 rows with 4 carrots in each row. How many carrots are there?
It rained 3 days last week and 2 days this week. How many rainy days in all?
You set out 16 plates for dinner. 9 guests show up. How many extra plates?
A book is 80 pages long. You have read 35. How many pages are left?
A cup holds 8 ounces. You drink 2 cups of water. How many ounces is that?
There are 14 birds at the feeder. 6 fly away. How many remain?
A pie is cut into 8 slices. You eat 1 and a friend eats 2. How many slices are left?
You buy 2 cans of soup at $3 each. How much in all?
A walk around the park is 20 minutes. You walk it twice. How long did you walk?
You start the day with $50. You spend $18 on lunch and $7 on coffee. How much is left?
Your mailbox had 12 letters. 4 were ads, the rest were real mail. How many real letters?
A bag of flour weighs 5 pounds. You buy 3 bags. How many pounds in all?
A movie is 90 minutes long. You have watched 40 minutes. How many minutes are left?
You plant 6 rose bushes in the front yard and 4 in the back. How many in all?
A carton of orange juice costs $4. You buy 2 cartons. How much do you spend?
Your appointment is at 3:00. It is now 2:15. How many minutes until your appointment?
There are 30 days in April. You have been on vacation for 12 of them. How many remain?
A chicken needs to roast 60 minutes. It has been in for 25 minutes. How much longer?
You buy a sweater for $35 with two $20 bills. How much change?
A garden hose is 50 feet long. The faucet is 18 feet from the bed. How much hose extends past the bed?
You hang 9 shirts on the line and 6 are dry already. How many are still wet?
A pair of shoes costs $40. They are on sale for $15 off. What is the sale price?
Your mug holds 12 ounces of coffee. You drink half. How many ounces are left?
It is 65°F outside. The forecast says it will drop 18 degrees overnight. What will the low be?
A recipe calls for 3 cups of flour. You are doubling it. How many cups do you need?
You have 25 minutes to get to the store before it closes. You arrive in 18 minutes. How much time to spare?
There are 5 photos on each of 4 pages of an album. How many photos in all?
A bank teller gives you 7 ten-dollar bills. How much money is that?
A garden bed is 8 feet long. You plant tulips every 2 feet. How many tulips fit?
You drink 2 glasses of water at breakfast and 3 at lunch. How many glasses so far?
A jigsaw puzzle has 100 pieces. You have placed 64. How many pieces remain?
Your bus ride takes 22 minutes. You have been riding 9 minutes. How much longer?
You buy 4 lemons at 50 cents each. How much do they cost?
There are 7 days in a week. How many days in 3 weeks?
You cook 2 batches of muffins, 6 muffins per batch. How many muffins in all?
A library book is due in 14 days. You have had it for 6 days. How many days until it is due?
